name: Sidebar navigation reaches grouped destinations without errors
description: After login, the sidebar groups are expanded so their links are visible; clicking links across different groups navigates to the correct page each time without errors or blank screens.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load

Verify the sidebar shows its grouped links expanded and visible, including Feynman Mode and Study Planner under the Study group and Analytics under the My Room group, without requiring the user to first expand a collapsed group
Click the Feynman Mode link in the sidebar
Verify the Feynman Mode page loads with a topic selector or an empty-state message visible
Click the Analytics link in the sidebar
Verify the Analytics page loads showing its heading and stat content, confirming the previously hidden grouped link is now directly reachable
